title: When Prince George had a playground spat, his unexpected reply got everyone talking
summary_full: A resurfaced anecdote reveals young Prince George telling a classmate, "My dad is going to be king so watch out." Royal experts interpret this as a child's natural assertion of identity, not arrogance, highlighting William and Kate's efforts to balance his royal destiny with a normal upbringing. The story humanizes the prince, resonating with the public.
